creator: meta@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 184935
patch

Update to 3.5.9. Poudriere test build passed for me.

This release includes several crashes. See also release note (written in Japanese).
http://mikutter.hatenablog.com/entry/2017/07/08/095439

* doesn't start with rubygem-memoist >= 0.16.0
* occasional crash when rubygem-gtk2 <= 3.1.1

The first one is the problem since rubygem-memoist port already has been updated to 0.16.0. IMO, this should be merged to quarterly.
